name: ala Bethesda

notes: Every frozen row was reconciled against the current restaurant-linked Toast representation reviewed on 2026-07-14.
Toast identifies ala I Bethesda at 4948 Fairmont Avenue, Bethesda, MD 20814 and publishes 35 unique products across Cold Mezze, Hot Mezze, Large Plates, and Sweets.
All 34 frozen names remain current; Layali Lubnan is the one additional current product.
The frozen generic Mediterranean category and adjacency-derived variant groups do not reflect the current source structure.
Featured items repeat products from their real sections and are not counted as additional formulations.
The restaurant-linked Toast menu publishes selected fixed descriptions and dietary labels but no complete allergen matrix, complete recipes, or cross-contact policy.
Twenty-seven current products have positive signals supported by fixed text or unavoidable named formats; eight remain unavailable rather than inferred.
Fifteen frozen rows underreported current signals; eleven are verified as published and eight remain accurately unavailable.
Vegan and gluten-free labels are not converted into negative allergen claims, and oat milk is not classified as milk.
Hummus and falafel remain unavailable because their current descriptions do not publish tahini or a complete recipe.
The frozen Toast parser retained current names but flattened every product into Mediterranean and assigned neighboring product names as variant groups.
It omitted Layali Lubnan and lost fixed signals from lavash, bulgur, pita crumbs, phyllo, dumplings, pide, baklava, semolina, labneh, mustard, and other explicit text.
The correction rebuilds the four current Toast sections, deduplicates featured-item repetitions, and recomputes positive signals from fixed descriptions only.
The current web representation was fully reviewed; direct command-line fetches of both aladc.com and Toast were blocked and are documented without promoting Toast to restaurant-issued authority.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Direct fetch failed before an HTTP response; the audit did not use the failed response as menu evidence.
Exhaustively reviewed the current web-accessible Toast representation: identity, address, four sections, 35 unique products, descriptions, prices, and dietary labels.
notes: The ledger CLI's direct capture received HTTP 403, so reproducibility uses stable location, section, and item-row anchors from the current representation.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Direct command-line capture returned HTTP 403; the same current menu was accessible through the reviewed web representation.
Found fixed ingredient descriptions and dietary labels but no complete allergen matrix, recipes, or cross-contact disclosure.

findings.summary: The frozen catalog lost all four current section identities, assigned neighboring products as variant groups, and omitted the current Layali Lubnan dessert.
findings.resolution: Rebuilt all 35 current products across the four live Toast sections, restored Layali Lubnan, and removed every corrupted adjacency-based variant group.

findings.summary: Fifteen frozen rows omitted allergens directly supported by current fixed descriptions, including milk, wheat/gluten, fish, tree nut, and mustard signals.
findings.resolution: Recomputed 27 supported positive rows from current fixed text while leaving eight incomplete recipes unavailable and preserving label/authority semantics.

findings.summary: The generic Toast extraction retained names but failed to preserve section and row boundaries and did not fully interpret the current fixed ingredient text.
findings.resolution: Prepared a current menu-manifest correction with exact section counts, current additions, featured-item deduplication, and source-bounded allergen invariants.

repairs.summary: Prepared and focused-tested a 35-product ala Bethesda catalog across four current Toast sections with 27 supported positive rows, eight unavailable rows, and every frozen structural/allergen defect corrected.
verificationCommands: RESTAURANT_REPOSITORY_PATH=/tmp/ala-bethesda-repository.json node scripts/repair-final-generated-regressions.mjs (isolated copy; verified 35 items, four categories, 27 positive rows, eight unavailable rows, and all current-section/source-semantic invariants)

notes: Current corrected catalog counts: 35 products, four categories, 27 positive rows, and eight unavailable rows.
